description_long: This lantern features a polygonal, faceted glass body with a frosted, icy blue appearance, encased by a thick, white, geometric frame. The upper section is constructed from a reddish-brown, tiered housing with angular, pagoda-like layers, each separated by thin horizontal bands. Small, teal-tinted window panels are set into the upper housing, suggesting areas for light emission. The topmost part is capped with a hexagonal, teal finial, adding a decorative and functional touch. The overall design is both ornamental and robust, evoking a blend of traditional Asian and modern fantasy aesthetics. The lantern appears suitable for outdoor urban environments, such as parks or pedestrian walkways.
description: A faceted, frosted blue glass lantern with a tiered, reddish-brown pagoda-style top and teal decorative accents, encased in a thick white frame.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hexagonal teal finial, the tiered reddish-brown top, and the full face of the frosted blue glass body.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, this view reveals more of the lantern's right side, highlighting the angular transitions between the glass body and the upper housing.
description_view_2: Back view displays the symmetry of the lantern, with the same tiered top and glass body, but less detail on the window panels.
description_view_3: Left-side view mirrors view 1, showing the left profile of the lantern and the geometric transitions between the materials.
